roa.docketEntryComment: REQ FOR LEAVE TO JOIN DEFT
REQ FOR LEAVE TO JOIN DEFT
MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONSTL/CITIZ RTS;PLD G CT3-12021(A)PC/FCRT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS PLEA;REF APD/RPT 1203C;CONT 1/18/95 9AM S2--SENTIBARRA RTS;DEFT WVS TIME FOR SENT
CONT 1/11/95 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR PTC/TRIAL RE CT3
CONT 1/10/95 AT 1045AM IN S28 FOR TRIAL
TRANSF TO D28 FOR TRIAL RE:CT3 AT 1045AM ON 1/10/95
DEFT APPEAR WVD;CRT GRTS DA MO DISM CTS1,2
CONT TO 1/9/95 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1//H1:941205/0900/S22/TR:950109/0930/S22
BAIL SET 25000;CT FINDS PROB CAUSE TO ARREST AND DETENTION
